sentence: 아버님 -- 지금은 보잘 것 없는 시골 출신이지만, 제게는 야망이 있습니다.
우선 식당을 열고… 더 나아지면 호텔을 갖고 싶습니다.
자네 아버님은 이 결혼에 대해 어떻게 생각하시나?
내 딸을 위해 자네가 뭘 해줄 수 있지?
꿈을 그렇게 쉽게 파는 사람에게 내 딸을 왜 줘야 하지?
뭐하고 있어? 정신이 나갔어? 빨리 나와!
왜 그래요? 수영 좀 하고 나왔는데.
아이 참! 다른 수영복도 있는데 왜 이걸 입어?
Do you think we should do something?
I don't know, he just walked up and started going off on her again.
이제 남편 말이 말 같지가 않아?
Hey, hey, hey -- get your hands off of her.
너랑 상관이 없는 일인데 왜 끼어들어?
I swear to god, you put your hands on her one more time...
네가 뭔데! 남의 일에 끼어들지 마!
Get your hands off of me.
너무 예뻐, 맘에 들어. 너 너무 좋겠다, 결혼도 하고...
제 와이프랑 단 둘이서 할 얘기가 있는데요.
선, 손님들 아랫층에 있는거 잊지 마, 알았지?
자기야, 나 너무 행복해. 아버님이 살아계셔서 우리 결혼식을 보셨더라면 참 좋았을텐데. 미안해요, 내가 괜한말을 했나봐.
아... 선. 나도 가고 싶지만, 지금은 안 되잖아. 지금은 아버님께 좋은 모습을 보여야 돼.
내가 아빠 딸인데... 우리 결혼식 하는 걸 가지고 뭐라고 하시겠어? 응?
내가 약속할게. 그땐 우리가 꿈꾸던 멋진 신혼여행이 될거야.
Don't worry. I stuck my nose where it didn't belong. It's on me.
Look, all I understand is that I've got to get this raft finished so I can get my boy out of here and take him home.
When I slapped you I was protecting you.
From Jin. You don't know what he's capable of.
It's not my problem. It's yours.

You should try sea urchin. They've got more ping. Hey, so listen, I know things got kind of nasty down there at the beach, and, um, I don't want to get involved in husband and wife stuff, but I figured, you know, you might need to relax. So... C'mon, dude, I'm trying here. Okay, you want to be an outsider? It's your business.
I tied this side down. Do you think this is going to hold?
Do you have a past in the Navy you neglected to tell me about?
How does a woman like you learn to tie a perfect bowline knot?
Since you bring it up. I've been worried since I first met you that you might end up being a spinster.
Spending my Saturday nights alone at home, tying knots?
Perhaps with an overweight aunt? It's a very sad image.
Maybe we should get some rope, spend a Saturday night alone together, and see what happens.
Thanks. You are going to love New York, Walt. No city like it. You know, what I really want to show you in New York are the buildings, the architecture...
Yeah, I used to say that, too, 'til I saw the Flat Iron Building.
Oldest skyscraper in the city, built in 1902. And it's flat. That one building inspired me to start drawing and, you know, designing things.
You've just got to see it, man. You want to see it, right?
I guess. Could I go throw the ball to Vincent?
Wow, you're making a lot of progress.
Got this bamboo for the decking. Got a piece of the fuselage for a cabin, some storage bins. -- What's up?
I thought I'd give you the heads-up.
Yeah, there's a lot of talk going on about who's going on this thing with you.
Hey man, it's not the Queen Mary. I've only got room for 4 people. There's one open spot.
What's the matter, Doc? Feelin' left out?
Yep, bought myself a ticket on this little tub. Let me tell you, the fare was steep. I could've used that cable to hold up the whole east wing of my new beach house.
I needed the halyards for the mast.
Good thing I'm a saver, not a spender, huh, Doc?
How much longer are you going to let him treat you this way?
Yeah, a husband you're afraid to tell you speak English. I'm trying to understand, Sun.
He wasn't always like this. He used to tell me how beautiful I looked to him. He was so tender. And then he was different.
The raft, it's on fire, look.
Where is he? Where the hell is he?!
No, her husband did this, and she knows. You're trying to protect him now, is that it?
Walt, hey Walt. Get back. Get back.
I'm going to break his damn neck!
Take it easy, man. We don't know that Jin did this.
Jack, c'mon, we saw him on the beach this morning.
That doesn't mean that he torched the raft.
당신이 이런 거에요? 마이클은... 이 섬에서 우리를 탈출시키려고 노력하는데 왜 그런 사람...
이번 일은 제가 모두 책임지겠습니다. 공장 기계가 나간 걸 제가 미리 체크하지 못했습니다.
자네를 문책하려고 부른게 아니고... 자네 승진 얘기를 하려고 부른거야. 이제 자네가 내 새로운 보좌관이 되어주게.
오늘 밤 메시지를 그에게 전달해주게. '내가 섭섭한 점이 참 많아서 그래.'
우선 이쪽으로 앉으세요. 뭐 마실 것 좀 드릴까요?
아니 괜찮습니다. 여기 회장님의 메시지를 전하러 왔습니다.
회장님이 굉장히 섭섭해 하시는데요... 그 말만...
아, 그래요? 고맙습니다. 고마워요! 회장님께 앞으로는 섭섭한 일 없도록 하겠다고 전해주세요. 어떻게라도 사과를 해야 하는데...
이 개는 당신께 드리는 선물입니다. 이 개는 품종이 좋은 개에요.
정말 비싼 개에요. 회장님께 사과 드린다고 꼭 전해주세요. 그래 주실 수 있죠?
받아주세요. 제발 받아주세요. 고맙습니다. 정말 고맙습니다.
I'd like to talk to you about Shannon. It's very possible your sister and I are going to become more than just friends.
What is this? Some Middle Eastern thing? You want my blessing or something?
My hope is you won't object.
I was extending a courtesy, not asking your permission.

Let me tell you about my sister. She likes older men, guys who can take care of her. My guess is, in this place, you fit the bill. She'll make you feel like the greatest guy ever while you get her food, or whatever it is that she needs. And when she gets whatever it is that she wants, she'll move on. When she does, don't take it personally, man.
You messed up my ride, Chief.
Hey, there you are. Come, help me with this, I'm completely destroying it.
You seem to be doing just fine.
Yeah, in trying making it collapse.
You're very capable, Shannon. I'm sure you'll be alright building it on your own.
Perhaps you should find another friend to help you with your shelter.
You've been talking to my brother, haven't you?
Gross to you, dinner to me.
What do you mean you don't know? You two are like jungle pals.
Well, if you do see him, tell him to keep his stupid mouth shut. And if he does have something to say, he can leave Sayid out of it, and come say it to my face.
Should I be writing this down?
Just tell him to stay the hell out of my business.
Because if you do -- like him, what's it got to do with your brother? You're a grown woman. Sure, you can yell at Boone 'til you're blue in the face, but all you're doing is giving him what he wants.
Your attention. Everyone gets a new life on this Island, Shannon. Maybe it's time you start yours.

You're pretty scared, huh? Scared, you understand scared, don't you? Huh? If you ain't, you're going to be, Bruce. Folks down on the beach might have been doctors and accountants a month ago, but it's Lord of the Flies time, now.
계속 걷고... 여기서 스톱! 돌고, 앉으세요. 쨘!
그럼... 자기를 위해서 만들었지. 우리 오랜만에 같이 저녁식사하는 거니까 맛있게 드세요.
걱정 마. 오늘은 일 안 해.
내 공장 문 닫게 만들었다 이거지? 메시지 못 전한 네 무능력 때문에 몇십 억을 손해본 줄 알아!
한병철 집에 이 사람 데려다 줘. 이 사람 하는 걸 보고 잘 배워!
2분 안에 처리할 테니 시동은 끄지 마시오. 내가 일 끝내고 돌아오면 빨리 운전해서... 시내와 떨어진 한가한 강가로 갑시다. 알겠소?
여보! 빨리 피해! 미스터 권, 내 말 좀 들어봐!
내일 바로 공장 문 열어! 내가 당신 목숨을 구했다는 걸 명심해. 이 정도면 알아듣겠죠.
여보... 여보! 말 좀 해봐. 다쳤어? 이 피는 누구 피야? 밖에서 무슨 일 있었구나, 어? 밖에서 무슨 일 있었냐구?
일 하고 왔다구? 도대체 아빠 밑에서 무슨 일을 하는거야?
아버님이 시키는 대로 할 뿐이야. 다 우리를 위해서 하는거야.
Hang on, man. You've got to slow down. Slow down!
Hey, man. You burn my raft?!
Just calm down. Calm down and take a breath.
You burn my raft?! Why'd you burn my raft, man?!
Just calm down, and think about it for a minute.
Look at his hands, man. They're burned.
Back off, Jack. It's got nothing to do with you.
No, no, no. Say it again, man.
Easy, Doc. One fight at a time.
He's right. This is between them.
내가 갔을 땐 이미 불타고 있었어!
불 끄려다가 내 손이 이렇게 된거야. 손을 좀 봐.
You understood us? All this time? Why didn't you say anything?
Your raft was already on fire when he arrived. He burned his hands trying to put it out.
잘못하지 않았는데 왜 도망쳤냐고 이 사람이 물어보네요.
My husband is many things. But he is not a liar.
You're going to lecture us about lying, Betty? From the look on his face, even your old man here didn't know you speak English. How do we know she's not covering for him?
Because she's isn't! Why would he burn the raft?
He's been after me since day one, everybody knows it! What if-

Okay, it's personal, but why take it out on our best chance of getting off the Island? Why would any one of us block an attempt to get home? We're so intent on pointing the finger at one another that we're ignoring the simple undeniable truth that the problem isn't here, it's there! They've attacked us, sabotaged us, abducted us, murdered us! Maybe it's time we stop blaming us and start worrying about them! We're not the only people on this Island and we all know it!
I can't salvage a thing -- pontoons, the decking. Fire burned up all the twine! Damn it!! Damn it!! God! I'm sorry, man.
No. Come here. Come here. Look, we all have set-backs. I mean, God knows, man. It's just life, we'll start over.
You're going to building another one?
No doubt you can help. Come on.

지금 뭐 하는 거에요? 말 좀 해 봐요! 어딜 가게요? 해변으로 가게요? 우리 관계를 이런 식으로 정리하고 싶어요? 뗏목에 대해서... 왜 나한테 사실을 말해주지 않았죠? 대답하기 싫어요? 나한테 이러는 이유를 모르겠어. 내가 뭘 잘못했는데? 우리가 언제부터 이렇게 대화가 안 됐어요! I was going to leave you! I was going to get away. But you made me change my mind. You made me think that you still loved me. 나... 처음부터 다시 시작하고 싶어. 여보... 우리 새롭게 시작해요, 네?
아주 예쁘고, 똑똑하고... 고집 있는 친구에요. 요즘은... 대화도 없어요.
아버님에 대한 진실을... 그 애에게 직접 얘기할 수가 없어요. 진실을 알게 되면... 나보다 아버님을 더 미워할테니까요.
제가 어떤 일을 저질렀는지 아버지는 모르실 거에요.
너는 내 아들이야. 니가 무슨 일을 하든 상관 없어.
아니, 니 부인보다 더 중요한 게 있어?
장인 어른은 제게 시드니와 LA에 있는 더러운 거래자에게 시계를 전달하라고 하셨어요.
그러면 이번일을 마지막으로 네 장인한테 해주고... 진수야. 손 떼고, 다신 하지 마. 그리고 미국으로 가. 응? 그래서 너의 결혼을 살려라.
Everyone gets a new life on this Island. I'd like to start now.
Hurley owes me 83,000 dollars. I told him I'd give him a chance to win it back.
It's been awhile since you and I played. I don't have 83,000 dollars.
Down at the beach, I think. I'm not allowed to leave the caves after dark. You have a dad?
Good for you. Hey, you mind if I ask you something?
Why did you burn the raft, Walt? Don't worry, I'm not going to tell. You must've had a really good reason.
I don't want to move anymore. I've been moving places my whole life. I like it here.
